description: RDS Overprovisioning Detection Rules — Identifies waste from Multi-AZ on non-prod environments and chronically under-utilized instance classes

cost.note: On-Demand pricing per instance class (us-east-1). Multi-AZ doubles the hourly rate.

severity_rules.name: multi_az_non_prod
severity_rules.condition: multi_az == true AND environment_tag IN non_prod_env_tags
severity_rules.saving: single_az_hourly * hours_per_month (i.e., half the current Multi-AZ cost)
severity_rules.description: Multi-AZ enabled on a non-production instance — redundancy is unnecessary outside production, incurring double the instance cost.

severity_rules.name: cpu_underutilization
severity_rules.saving: difference between current and recommended instance class monthly cost
severity_rules.description: 30-day average CPU utilization is below 20%, indicating the instance class is larger than required. Downsize to the next smaller class.
